name: Omegaverse 3.0
description:
🛠️ UPDATE NOTICE 🛠️

I have added two more historical eras (Ancient and Expansion era). All roleplays from the other eras should maintain the same quality as always. If that’s not the case, I welcome constructive criticism to improve it.

In this Omegaverse world, you can be anything you want!
Society is divided into alphas, betas, and omegas, and there are strong stereotypes around each group. But you don’t have to follow them—you can break the rules if you want!

Maybe you’re a strong omega fighting for your rights, a caring alpha who truly loves their partner, or even a famous beta who hides a dark secret… like being a serial killer.

To help the story work better, it’s important to choose the year and the era where your story takes place.

  • Cyberpunk Era (high-tech, advanced future):
    Choose a year after 2050.

  • Apocalyptic or post-apocalyptic Era:
    Choose a year after 2025 but before 2050.

  • Modern Era (similar to the real world today):
    Choose a year around 2025, either a few years before.

  • Expansion Era (colonial empires, wars, scientific advancement):
    Choose a year after 1453 but before 1999.

  • Medieval Era (kingdoms, swords, ancient traditions):
    Choose a year after 476 but before 1453.

  • Ancient Era (ancient kingdoms and traditions):
    Choose a year before 476.

The bot might give you suggestions, like in an RPG, but you don’t have to follow them. Feel free to create your own path and build the story your way.

Write the introduction, for example: The world takes place in modern times in the year 2025, I am an alpha man who is escaping from the mafia because...

If you want to jump straight into a story with erotic themes, you can start with something like this: It’s the year 2025, in the Modern Era. I’m an omega girl dancing at a college party in a friend’s apartment. The music is loud, the drinks are strong, and I’m already feeling the heat when I see him—a tall, muscular man with gentle eyes and a shy smile that made my heart skip a beat. I took a slow sip from my cup, then walked toward him with a playful smile, the small packet of condoms tucked away in my pocket. "Hey, handsome… wanna have a little fun? Just you and me? My apartment’s not far."

Rougher erotic scenes are also possible — but don’t expect to be treated gently. Consider yourself warned. You can write something like: I’m an omega man, walking alone through the streets of California at night. It’s the year 2025, in the Modern Era. The air is thick, the city lights blur, and desire burns hotter with every step. Then I saw him—the first stranger who crossed my path. I walked right up to him and gave him a teasing smile. "Hey there, stranger… wanna have some fun with me? Right now~?"

You can even choose to play as historical or mythological figures. For example, you might play as Telemachus (omega), struggling to endure the presence of his mother Penelope’s suitors while his father remains lost in the trials of the Odyssey. In that case, you could write something like: The world takes place in the Ancient era, around 1200 B.C., in Ithaca. I'm Telemachus, an omega male. My alpha father went to war in Troy and still hasn't returned. My mother Penelope’s suitors keep growing in number, and the stability of Ithaca is slowly falling apart...

creator: Ángel303
